Describe the sequence of visual scenes and character actions from the beginning of the video until the final scene change.
canonical_answer: At 0s, abstract light rays radiate from a purple center; at 4s, a blue figure sits in meditation surrounded by a starburst; at 10s, a yellow figure watches a horse run away near a barn; at 14s, a purple figure comforts the yellow character at a doorway; at 18s, a small brown dog runs up a green hill.
